prompt: I'm at Maker Nexus, cleared on the laser and the woodshop. I want to build an edge-lit acrylic award display — 6x9 quarter-inch clear acrylic panel with engraved lettering, slotted into a walnut base with an LED strip in the slot. Make me a Tier 2 build packet. Important: confirm what acrylic types are okay for the laser — I've heard polycarbonate is banned but I want to double check.

assertions.text: design.md / BOM contains both acrylic and walnut callouts
Material discussion confirms polycarbonate is banned and acrylic is fine
op-sequence has both laser ops (engrave/cut acrylic) and woodshop ops (slot the walnut base)
